title: rhinanthus contrinensis
intro: Rhinanthus contrinensis, also known as Yellow Rattle, is a hemiparasitic perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of dyspepsia. The plant's health benefits include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a mild diuretic. In herbal preparations, Rhinanthus contrinensis is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various gastrointestinal issues.
